facebook.caption:
Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Big mistake.

Dgold Spa is sitting on a 5.0★ rating and most visitors never find it. Body massage, foot massage, shampoo, nails. One stop after a full beach day.

No resort markup. No tourist-trap pricing. Just a clean, well-rated local spa that repeat visitors keep coming back to.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
